New Initiative

Dependable nightly report export

Ship a recurring nightly export so downstream data lands on time, every night, within a tight, observable window.

In scope
  • A recurring nightly export cadence
  • A bounded completion window
Out of scope
  • On-demand / ad-hoc exports
  • Downstream consumer changes

Delivery story

Recurring export cadence US1

As a user I want a recurring cadence for a report export.

Acceptance: the export runs nightly.

What it must do

Nightly export FR-001

The system must export nightly.

How we will know

Completion window SC-001

Exports complete within ten minutes.

Known gap

Status: needs author input

What is the business outcome a late export costs us (e.g. an SLA, a downstream deadline)? The source does not yet state the quantified outcome this cadence protects.
